creator: nakaji@zeisei3.dpri.kyoto-u.ac.jp
text:
These are ports to make X-TT servers on PC98 machines 
and to make them some files in x11/XttXF86srv-common are modified.
The changes are approved by Mr. Taguchi <taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp>, 
who is the maintainer of x11/XttXF86srv-*.

Fix: 

Patch for x11/XttXF86srv-common and the archive file of new ports 
x11/XttXF98-* are respectively found at
http://zeisei5.dpri.kyoto-u.ac.jp/~nakaji/install/FreeBSD/ref/XttXF86srv-common.diff
and
http://zeisei5.dpri.kyoto-u.ac.jp/~nakaji/install/FreeBSD/ref/XttXF98srv.tgz
